metaDescription: Learn how to navigate Freshdesk's analytics tools to track support performance and spot trends in your ticket data.
intro: Freshdesk's analytics tools turn your ticket history into actionable insight about team performance and customer experience. This guide covers how to get started using them.

steps.heading: Open the analytics dashboard
steps.body: Navigate to the analytics section of your Freshdesk account from the main menu.

steps.heading: Explore the available metrics
steps.body: Browse through pre-built views covering ticket volume, response times, and resolution rates.

steps.heading: Filter and segment the data
steps.body: Narrow the view by date range, agent, or ticket type to focus on the trends you care about.

steps.heading: Save or share insights
steps.body: Save useful views or export the data to share findings with your team or leadership.

faq.question: What metrics does Freshdesk analytics track?
faq.answer: It typically covers ticket volume, response and resolution times, agent workload, and customer satisfaction scores.

faq.question: Can I create custom views in analytics?
faq.answer: Yes, you can filter and segment data to build views tailored to your specific questions.

faq.question: Is analytics available on every Freshdesk plan?
faq.answer: The depth of analytics available typically depends on your plan tier, with more advanced options on higher tiers.

faq.question: Can I export analytics data?
faq.answer: Yes, most analytics views can be exported for sharing or further analysis outside Freshdesk.
